title: Dimensions & specifications
description: VR combines a clean, geometric form with flexible height options, making it a practical solution for modern workspaces. The collection is available in four width options — 120, 140, 160, and 180 cm — and two depth options — 70 and 80 cm. As an additional option, VR can be equipped with smooth height adjustment from 64 to 84 cm, allowing even better adaptation to different users and working styles.
